Someone left a Texas Chain Saw Massacre tape in the returns bin with a note that just said 'sorry.' That's never a good sign. I put gloves on before I touched it.
Rented Vertigo for date night because I thought it was a romance. It is NOT a romance. Well, it kind of is? Anyway, there was no second date.

easter-puzzle.dialogue: Dear, I remember when Roger Rabbit came out... what year was that again?
My fiancé keeps quoting that 'I love the smell of napalm' line. Which movie is that from?
UHHH MY MOM SAID I CAN'T WATCH THE ROBOT COP MOVIE!! What's it rated anyway??
I'm looking for that Costner movie with all the gangsters. Who directed The Untouchables?
Looking for something with... what do you call them... hippity-hoppity creatures. Fluffy ears, you know.
I WANT MOVIES WHERE DEAD PEOPLE COME BACK!! Like zombies but COOLER!! MY FRIEND SAID THERE'S ONE WITH A BIRD GUY!!
easter-puzzle.hintCategory: Resurrection Stories: Characters Who Return from Death

easter-puzzle.dialogue: I'm in the mood for something seasonal. You know, flowers blooming, new beginnings, that sort of thing.
easter-puzzle.hintCategory: Spring Forward: Films Set During Easter or Spring

easter-puzzle.dialogue: Guy came in last week, returned Fatal Attraction, wouldn't make eye contact. His wife was with him. I've never seen someone look so scared of a VHS tape.
We got a call about a 'suspicious package' behind the store last month. Know what it was? Someone's overdue copy of An Officer and a Gentleman. Six months late.
My ex tried to impress me by renting Watership Down for date night. Thought it was a cute bunny movie. We broke up halfway through.

monday-morning-rewind.dialogue: Quick quiz before I head to the office -- who directed Training Day?
Dear, I remember that courtroom movie with Joe Pesci... My Cousin Vinny. What state was it set in?
I HEARD THEY MADE ROCKY FOR LIKE NO MONEY!! HOW MANY DAYS DID THEY SHOOT IT IN??
Denzel Washington won his first Oscar for Glory, right? What branch of the military was his character in?
I seek films where the accused stand before the tribunal! Gavels striking, objections sustained, justice hanging in the balance!
You know them movies where nobody in the cast was famous yet? Like, you watch 'em now and go 'oh THAT'S who that is!'
monday-morning-rewind.hintCategory: Entire Cast Was Unknown at the Time

monday-morning-rewind.dialogue: There are films crafted under impossible constraints... shot in haste, completed before the moon could cycle. Speed creates its own power.
Some guy returned Philadelphia on a Monday morning and wrote 'This movie changed my life' on a napkin tucked inside the case. I laminated it. It's on the wall by the register.
Dude my older brother said Dazed and Confused is basically a documentary about what high school was ACTUALLY like in the 70s. He wasn't even born in the 70s though so like... sus.
Every Monday morning the same guy comes in and rents The Warriors. Every single Monday. Says it motivates him for the week. Whatever works, I guess.

two-for-tuesday.dialogue: Big Connery fan here. In The Hunt for Red October, what nationality is his character?
My buddy says Reservoir Dogs has no actual heist scene in it. Is that true?
MY DAD SAYS THEY ACTUALLY ESCAPED FROM ALCATRAZ FOR REAL!! HOW MANY GUYS ESCAPED IN THE MOVIE??
That Paul Newman picture, The Sting... what card game do they play in the big con?
Looking for films where somebody plans the perfect crime. You know, masks, vaults, getaway drivers, the whole nine yards.
I want movies where the ending you saw in theaters was NOT what the director wanted. Studios meddling, test audiences panicking, that whole mess.
Got a thing for movies set behind bars. You know, prison walls, guards, escape plans. The whole lockdown vibe.
Two-for-Tuesday! Know what else comes in twos? The number of brain cells I have left after watching Highlander three times in a row. THERE CAN BE ONLY ONE... brain cell!
A MAN RETURNED THE GREEN MILE LAST TUESDAY AND HIS EYES WERE RED AS BERRIES. HE SAID 'IT'S JUST ALLERGIES.' WE ALL KNEW. WE ALL KNEW.
Some guy tried to haggle the two-for-Tuesday deal down to 'free-for-Tuesday.' Manager just stared at him for like thirty seconds straight. He left without a tape.

midweek-madness.dialogue: Buddy cop question -- in Rush Hour, what precious artifact gets stolen from the Chinese consulate?
I saw The French Connection when it first came out. Gene Hackman chases a train in what city?
MY COUSIN SAID LAST ACTION HERO FLOPPED BECAUSE IT OPENED AGAINST WHAT MOVIE?? Something about dinosaurs??
Wes Craven's New Nightmare -- who plays herself in the movie, the actress from the original Elm Street?
I WANT THE MOVIES WHERE THERE'S A COP AND ANOTHER COP AND THEY DON'T LIKE EACH OTHER BUT THEN THEY'RE BEST FRIENDS!! THOSE ONES!!
I enjoy films where the characters are watching a film within the film. It's like a cinematic turducken, non?
I appreciate when actors put their bodies on the line. None of this CGI nonsense -- real stunts, real danger, real commitment.
midweek-madness.hintCategory: Lead Actor Did Their Own Dangerous Stunts

midweek-madness.dialogue: WEDNESDAY IS THE BEST DAY BECAUSE NOBODY'S HERE AND I CAN JUST SIT IN THE ACTION AISLE AND READ ALL THE VHS BOXES WITHOUT ANYONE TELLING ME TO STOP!!
My wedding's Saturday and my fiancé is in here renting Bad Boys instead of picking up the cake. If I end up on the evening news, you saw nothing.
Midweek is when the good tapes come back, dearie. All the weekend warriors return their rentals and suddenly the shelves are full again. It's like Christmas morning.

throwback-thursday.dialogue: John Travolta in Pulp Fiction -- what does he order at Jack Rabbit Slim's?
I watched Twister about fifty times. What scale do they use to rate the tornadoes?
In Chinatown, the detective played by Jack Nicholson has his nose sliced. Who wields the blade?
Michael J. Fox was NOT the first choice for Back to the Future. Who originally started filming as Marty McFly?
Looking for those big catastrophe pictures -- buildings falling, tidal waves, planes crashing. The bigger the destruction, the better.
Yo, I want movies set in L.A. -- like palm trees, highways, the Hollywood sign, all that California stuff.
I am curious about films where the hero we see was NOT the hero first chosen. A different warrior was meant to bear the mantle!
throwback-thursday.hintCategory: Lead Actor Was Not the First Choice

throwback-thursday.dialogue: Every Thursday some guy comes in wearing bell-bottoms and a butterfly collar asking for Saturday Night Fever. He dances out the door with it. Every. Single. Thursday.
A customer asked me to recommend a 'throwback' movie. I said Chinatown. He said he meant something from the 90s. I have never felt so old in my entire life.
Throwback Thursday? More like THROW BACK this tape that's been rewound so many times the picture looks like a Monet painting! Ha! Art jokes! I'm branching out!

friday-night-fever.dialogue: Bruce Willis in The Fifth Element -- what's the name of the supreme being he has to protect?
IN DIRTY DANCING, WHAT IS THE FAMOUS LINE PATRICK SWAYZE SAYS? ABOUT BABY AND A CORNER?
answers: "You can't put Baby in a corner"

friday-night-fever.dialogue: Das Boot is set during which war?
DIE HARD 2 IS SET IN AN AIRPORT RIGHT?? WHICH AIRPORT IS IT??
Friday night and I want to DANCE. Give me movies with big dance scenes -- disco, ballroom, whatever, just get me moving.
I like movies set on the water. Submarines, cruise ships, sailboats -- anything where you're stuck on a vessel with nowhere to go.
friday-night-fever.hintCategory: Set on a Boat or Ship

friday-night-fever.dialogue: Dearie, I've heard tell of films where they built a REAL working car or machine just for the picture. Not those computer tricks -- actual contraptions!
friday-night-fever.hintCategory: Prop Master Built a Fully Functional Vehicle

friday-night-fever.dialogue: Friday nights in here are CHAOS. Last week two teenagers got into a tug-of-war over the last copy of Die Hard with a Vengeance. The tape didn't survive. Neither did their dignity.
Every Friday my wife rents Dirty Dancing and I rent an action movie. We compromise by watching Dirty Dancing. Every. Single. Friday.
Some dude came in asking for 'that submarine movie where everyone speaks German.' I said Das Boot. He said 'No, I think it was in English.' Sir, the TITLE is German.

saturday-matinee.dialogue: MY MOM RENTED TEEN WOLF AND IT HAS THAT GUY FROM BACK TO THE FUTURE!! What sport does he play in it??
Enter the Dragon is considered Bruce Lee's masterpiece. What island is the tournament held on?
answers: A private island owned by Han

saturday-matinee.dialogue: That Clockwork Orange film was quite shocking, dear. What was the main character's name?
THE BLUES BROTHERS MOVIE HAS THE BIGGEST CAR CHASE EVER!! HOW MANY CARS DID THEY WRECK??
I seek films of combat discipline. Kicks and strikes, dojos and tournaments, the ancient arts of hand-to-hand warfare on screen.
I've heard some movies had to be cut down from an X rating or NC-17. Pushed the limits so far the ratings board freaked out.
I read somewhere that for certain movies they actually DEMOLISHED a real building for the shot. Not a set -- a real structure. Insane commitment.
saturday-matinee.hintCategory: A Real Building Was Demolished for Filming

saturday-matinee.dialogue: On Saturday mornings the store fills with younglings seeking animated tales. I too once sought such tales. Now I seek only honor. And also RoboCop.
Saturday matinee! When I was a kid we'd sneak into the second showing by hiding in the bathroom. Now I just rent VHS tapes like a law-abiding clown. Character growth!
My boy wants to rent Kickboxer for his birthday party. He's seven. I told him we're watching The Secret of My Success instead. He's not speaking to me.

sunday-slow-burn.dialogue: Robert De Niro in Raging Bull -- he gained how much weight for the older version of Jake LaMotta?
L.A. Confidential -- who plays the by-the-book detective Edmund Exley?
MY DAD MADE ME WATCH APOCALYPSE NOW AND IT WAS SO LONG!! WHAT RIVER DO THEY GO UP IN THE MOVIE??
The Usual Suspects -- what's the name of the legendary crime lord nobody believes is real?
I like those dark detective pictures. Femme fatales, neon signs in the rain, everybody smoking cigarettes and looking suspicious. The moody ones.
I've heard some movies have a director's cut that's basically a completely different film. Like, different ending, different scenes, the works.
I respect dedication. Some actors stayed in character for MONTHS -- off camera, at home, at restaurants. Total commitment.
sunday-slow-burn.hintCategory: Actor Stayed in Character Off-Set for Months

sunday-slow-burn.dialogue: Sunday is for slow movies. Spent all day watching Raging Bull and now I want to fight everyone in this store. That film does something to you.
MY GRANDPA FELL ASLEEP WATCHING APOCALYPSE NOW AND WHEN THE HELICOPTER SCENE CAME ON HE WOKE UP AND THREW THE REMOTE AT THE TV. SUNDAYS ARE WILD AT OUR HOUSE.
I love a Sunday slow burn. Made a cup of tea, put on Body Heat, and just let the afternoon melt away. This is what weekends are for.

the-clearance-rack.dialogue: Keanu Reeves in Speed -- what speed does the bus have to stay above or it explodes?
Dude, in Bill and Ted's Excellent Adventure, what do they use to travel through time?
Alien is famous for its tagline. What is it?
answers: "In space, no one can hear you scream."
"Who will survive and what will be left of them?"

the-clearance-rack.dialogue: Tremors takes place in a tiny desert town. What's the name of it?
I seek tales of survival against terrible beasts! Creatures that hunt in darkness, monsters with acid blood, things that burrow beneath the earth!
MY BROTHER SAYS THERE ARE MOVIES WHERE THE BOX COVER IS COOLER THAN THE ACTUAL MOVIE!! LIKE THE PICTURE IS AWESOME BUT THE MOVIE STINKS!!
the-clearance-rack.hintCategory: Movie Poster is More Famous Than the Film

the-clearance-rack.dialogue: I read that some classic films didn't even have a finished script when cameras started rolling. They literally made it up as they went along.
The clearance rack is where forgotten warriors go to rest. But sometimes... a customer rescues one. And it lives again. Mostly it's Gymkata though.
The clearance rack! Where dreams go to die for $1.99! I found a copy of Solarbabies there once and honestly? I overpaid!
Found a kid hiding behind the clearance rack eating candy he didn't pay for. When I confronted him he said 'You'll never take me alive' and ran. He was six.

back-of-the-store.dialogue: Tarantino's first film was Reservoir Dogs. What color name does Tim Roth's character go by?
In The Crow, Brandon Lee tragically died during filming. What was his character's name?
DEATH WISH! CHARLES BRONSON! What city does his character clean up?
THE WIZARD OF OZ IS LIKE A MILLION YEARS OLD!! WHAT COLOR ARE DOROTHY'S MAGIC SHOES??
I'm looking for those revenge pictures, dearie. Someone gets wronged and they come back with a vengeance. Very satisfying.
Films set in the great city of steel and glass... the island of Manhattan, where warriors walk among millions.
I've heard horror stories about movie sets where actors got seriously hurt. Not stunt doubles -- the actual stars. Dangerous business, filmmaking.
back-of-the-store.hintCategory: An Actor Was Injured on Set

back-of-the-store.dialogue: Customer whispered to me: 'What's in the BACK of the store?' I said 'A mop closet and my lunch.' He looked so disappointed. What was he expecting?
My fiancé found a bootleg copy of Kill Bill behind the store counter and tried to buy it. The manager said 'That's my personal copy.' They stared at each other for way too long.
THERE'S A SECTION IN THE BACK WITH A CURTAIN AND MY MOM WON'T LET ME GO IN THERE!! SHE SAYS IT'S FOR 'BORING ADULT MOVIES' BUT WHY IS THERE A CURTAIN THEN??

staff-picks.dialogue: Scorsese and De Niro are a legendary duo. How many films did they make together?
All the President's Men is about Watergate. What newspaper do Woodward and Bernstein work for?
IN JAWS THE SHARK POPS UP AND THE GUY SAYS THEY NEED A BIGGER SOMETHING!! BIGGER WHAT??
Fargo by the Coen Brothers -- what state is it primarily set in?
I'm into conspiracy stuff. Secret government programs, paranoid journalists, shadowy organizations pulling strings behind the scenes.
Some movies just NAIL the opening scene. Like, the first five minutes are so good you could almost stop watching after that. Almost.
staff-picks.hintCategory: Opening Scene Is the Best Scene

staff-picks.dialogue: I appreciate a good eye behind the camera. There's one cinematographer whose name keeps popping up on every best-of list. Roger something?
The staff picks shelf hasn't changed in three months. It's just whatever Todd likes. Todd likes Goodfellas. We all know Todd likes Goodfellas, Todd.
I put a staff pick sticker on every tape in the horror section. Manager made me peel them all off. Took four hours. Worth it for the look on his face!
The young man at the counter recommended The Manchurian Candidate. I told him I saw it in theaters in 1962. He looked at me like I was a time traveler. I suppose I am, in a way.

cult-corner.dialogue: Dude, in 12 Monkeys, Bruce Willis gets sent back in time from what year?
An American Werewolf in London won the first-ever Oscar for Best Makeup. Who did the effects?
Poltergeist -- who actually directed it? There's been a huge controversy about this.
SILVER BULLET IS BASED ON A STEPHEN KING BOOK RIGHT?? WHAT'S THE BOOK CALLED??
I seek tales of temporal displacement! Heroes flung through the ages, paradoxes unraveling, timelines bending like a bow!
I WANT THE SHINY TAPES!! THE ONES WITH THE HOLOGRAM COVERS THAT CHANGE WHEN YOU TILT THEM!! THEY'RE SO COOL DO YOU HAVE ANY??
cult-corner.hintCategory: VHS Cover Had a Lenticular or Holographic Sleeve

cult-corner.dialogue: I heard some movies had the director fired halfway through and someone else had to finish it. Hollywood politics, I tell you.
cult-corner.hintCategory: Director Was Fired and Replaced Mid-Shoot

cult-corner.dialogue: The cult corner is sacred ground. Here, the misunderstood films find their people. I once met a man who had watched The Howling forty-seven times. He had achieved enlightenment.
Got called to the store because someone was 'causing a disturbance' in the cult section. Turned out he was just loudly explaining why Tombstone is historically inaccurate. To nobody.
I spent three hours in the cult corner last Sunday and left with seven tapes. My husband asked if I joined a religion. Honestly? Closer to the truth than he thinks.

two-copies-left.dialogue: Jeff Goldblum in The Fly -- what does his character transform into?
Dawn of the Dead takes place almost entirely in what kind of building?
TOP GUN! KENNY LOGGINS! What is the name of that glorious song that plays during the volleyball scene?
RE-ANIMATOR IS LIKE THE GROSSEST MOVIE EVER!! What does Herbert West use to bring people back to life??
Looking for zombie flicks. Not the fast ones from later -- the classic shambling undead. Romero and that whole crew.
You know how some movie soundtracks sold more copies than the movie sold tickets? The music just took on a life of its own?
I heard the most disturbing thing, dearie -- that some older films used REAL human remains as props. Gives me the shivers just thinking about it.
two-copies-left.hintCategory: Used a Real Skeleton as a Prop

two-copies-left.dialogue: TWO COPIES LEFT of Jurassic Park and there are THREE people eyeing it. This is about to become a situation. I can feel it. Where's my walkie-talkie.
Only two copies left! That's one more than the number of brain cells I use to pick movies! I just go by the cover art! That's how I ended up watching Re-Animator at age nine!
I drove to three different video stores looking for The Fly. This is the last one with copies. If they're both rented out I'm going to have a very public meltdown.

the-drop-box.dialogue: Tim Burton's Beetlejuice -- how many times do you have to say his name to summon him?
CHILD'S PLAY!! THE DOLL'S NAME IS CHUCKY BUT WHAT'S THE REAL NAME OF THE KILLER INSIDE HIM??
Tron was groundbreaking for its use of computer graphics. What year was it released?
Fast Times at Ridgemont High -- who played the legendary stoner Jeff Spicoli?
I love movies about cursed objects. Dolls that come alive, cars that kill people, videotapes that doom you -- that creepy 'don't touch that!' vibe.
I WANT MOVIES WHERE THEY'RE IN SCHOOL!! LIKE HIGH SCHOOL WITH LOCKERS AND CAFETERIAS AND STUFF!! BUT SCARY ONES TOO!!
I'm fascinated by films that literally invented new special effects technology. Where they had to create something that didn't exist to get the shot.
the-drop-box.hintCategory: Had to Create a New FX Technique for the Film

the-drop-box.dialogue: Someone dropped a tape in the drop box at 3 AM last night. The security camera showed them sprinting away like they were being chased. It was a copy of Christine. The car movie. Fitting.
The drop box is a noble invention. Return your tape under cover of darkness, no judgment, no eye contact. It is the knight's preferred method of return. Ask no questions.
Dearie, I found a half-eaten sandwich inside a returned VHS case once. The tape was Pee-wee's Big Adventure. I don't know what I expected, honestly.

members-only.dialogue: Al Pacino's famous line in Scarface -- what does he say about his little friend?
In Lawrence of Arabia, who plays the title character?
THEY LIVE HAS THAT SCENE WHERE THE GUY PUTS ON SUNGLASSES AND SEES ALIENS!! WHO IS THE GUY??
Amadeus won Best Picture. How many Oscars did it take home that night?
I'm looking for alien movies. Not the friendly kind -- the kind where they come to Earth and wreck everything.
Yo, I want desert movies. Like sand dunes, scorching heat, no water for miles. That Mad Max vibe.
Dearie, are there films that bombed at the picture house but somehow won the big award anyway? That seems backwards to me.
members-only.hintCategory: Flopped Theatrically, Won Best Picture at the Oscars

members-only.dialogue: Members only! That's what the bouncer said when I tried to get into the video store wearing my pajamas at 2 AM. Joke's on him -- I WAS a member! The pajamas were just... a choice.
I've been a member here since 1987. My card is so worn you can barely read it. The clerk squints at it every time like I'm presenting a medieval artifact. Buddy, I was here before you were born.
MY MOM'S MEMBERSHIP CARD HAS A GOLD STAR ON IT BECAUSE SHE'S RENTED OVER 500 MOVIES!! SHE SAYS IT'S NOT SOMETHING TO BRAG ABOUT BUT I THINK IT'S THE COOLEST THING EVER!!

2026-vibe-jam.dialogue: UHHH MY MOM SAID I CAN RENT ONE MOVIE AND IT HAS TO BE EDUCATIONAL!! What's WarGames about??
answers: A kid hacks into a military computer and almost starts World War III
Kids get trapped in a board game and have to win to escape
A teenage hacker steals money from evil corporations
Computers become self-aware and take over the Pentagon

2026-vibe-jam.dialogue: My grandson keeps talking about this Bolt picture. Is that the one with the dog or the runner fellow?
answers: It's an animated movie about a dog who thinks he has superpowers
It's a documentary about Olympic sprinter Usain Bolt
It's about a dog who runs in the Olympics
It's a nature documentary about lightning storms

2026-vibe-jam.dialogue: Date night. She likes those feel-good movies. What's Good Vibrations about?
answers: A music drama about a record shop owner in Belfast during the Troubles
California surfers starting a rock band in the 60s
A Beach Boys biography from their early years
A romantic comedy set at a music festival

2026-vibe-jam.dialogue: MY DAD SAYS HACKERS IS COOL BUT IS IT COOLER THAN TINDENDO?? What do they even hack in it??
answers: They hack a corporate computer system and uncover an embezzlement scheme
They hack into NORAD and almost launch nuclear missiles
They hack ATMs to steal money for college tuition
They hack the FBI database to clear their criminal records

2026-vibe-jam.dialogue: Looking for something with good energy, you know? Groovy wavelengths. Positive frequencies.
My buddy's into those computer crime flicks. Breaking into systems, sticking it to the man, that whole scene.
I NEED MOVIES ABOUT GOING UP!! Like stairs but COOLER!! My brother says there's a bunch with the same word!!
Kid tried to rent Sneakers yesterday with a fake ID. Fake ID said he was 47 years old. Kid was maybe twelve.
Why did the VHS tape go to therapy? It had too many issues and kept getting rewound! Get it? REWOUND!
A gentleman always rewinds his tapes. Last week I returned The Net without rewinding. I haven't slept since. The shame is unbearable.

2026-04-22.dialogue: Police business — in The Fugitive, what crime is Dr. Richard Kimble wrongly convicted of?
OK obvious one but: in Footloose, what does the town ban?
TELL ME, MERCHANT! In The Princess Bride, what is Inigo Montoya seeking REVENGE for?
Quick one for you — what year did Training Day come out?
Dearie, I want films where some poor fellow is blamed for something he didn't do, you know, on the run from the law for a crime that wasn't his...
I need movies where suddenly EVERYONE is dancing and it RIPS. The kind of scene you rewind for. Big choreographed energy.
Looking for movies with that intense actor — won the Oscar for the cop movie? He's in everything serious. Booming voice.
Why did the framed man refuse to dance? Because every time he tried — someone PINNED it on him! HA! ...okay tough crowd.
I rented Footloose thinkin' it was about my old tractor. Two hours of Kevin Bacon kickin' up dust later, I gotta say — kid can move.
Verily, I attempted the dance from Napoleon Dynamite at the Renaissance Faire. The lute player wept. Not from joy.

2026-04-23.dialogue: In She's All That, what does Freddie Prinze Jr.'s character bet he can do?
answers: Make a nerdy girl prom queen

2026-04-23.dialogue: In The Dark Knight, what does the Joker do with the giant pile of money at the warehouse?
OK in Pirates of the Caribbean, what is the name of Jack Sparrow's ship?
In Old Yeller, what kind of dog is Old Yeller?
I want, like, the WHOLE 90s teen vibe — prom, the popular kids, somebody asks somebody out, fall soundtrack BANGS. You know??
I'm doing a presentation on negotiation tactics — I need movies where the bad guy gives some MONOLOGUE that's just chef's kiss. Quotable evil.
My fiancé wants something tied to the theme parks — the rides we went on for our engagement! Movies based on Disney attractions, please.
I made the mistake of watching Marley & Me with the prep team. We had to comp three desserts because everyone was crying onto the brûlée.
Yo my mom rented American Pie thinkin' it was a baking movie. Walked in five minutes later. We do NOT talk about it.
Rookie at the firehouse asked if Jungle Cruise was a documentary. I'm gonna let him live it down. Eventually.

2026-04-24.dialogue: GREAT QUESTION, MERCHANT! In Blazing Saddles, what is the name of the town being threatened by the railroad?
In Spaceballs, what's the name of the planet whose air is being stolen?
Dear, in The Hangover, what city do the boys lose their friend in?
Reservoir Dogs — Tarantino's debut. What color is NOT one of the heist crew's code names?
I seek the works of the great jester Brooks! Films of MIRTH and parody, where every scene mocks the genre it lives within!
I'm into films where the final shot just... freezes. Like, the movie commits to one image and rolls credits over it. Real artsy stuff.
2026-04-24.hintCategory: Movie Ends With a Freeze Frame

2026-04-24.dialogue: I'm planning a bachelor party themed movie night — neon lights, casinos, bad decisions. Sin City vibes only.
Why are first-time directors like a freezer-burned VHS? They both make their DEBUT a little rough! ...I'll keep working on it.
We almost had our reception in Vegas. Then I watched The Hangover. Then I rewatched it. Then we booked Vegas anyway.
My nephew showed me Young Frankenstein. I haven't laughed that hard since the rooster fell in the silo. PUT THE CANDLE BACK.

2026-04-25.dialogue: In Little Miss Sunshine, what kind of vehicle does the family drive?
In Jurassic Park, what's the name of the island where the dinosaurs live?
In Raiders of the Lost Ark, what is Indiana Jones afraid of?
Whisper it... in Se7en, what is in the box at the end?
I want movies where a family piles into a vehicle and EVERYTHING goes wrong on the way somewhere. Kids fightin', dad drivin' too long, the works.
Need movies with people stuck on an island. Could be vacation gone bad, could be a survival thing, could be dinosaurs — open to it all.
That fellow with the hat and the whip... no wait, also the spaceship one... and the cop on the run... I want HIS movies. He's been around forever.
My honeymoon was a road trip to the coast. Halfway there, my husband insisted on watching National Lampoon's Vacation in the motel. Foreshadowing.
Why did the bad guy win at the end of the movie? Because the screenwriter wanted you to leave SAD! Art, baby!
I asked dad if we could take a road trip. He said only if I promised not to do the Are We There Yet bit. I made it eleven minutes.

2026-04-26.dialogue: In Coming to America, what fictional African country is Prince Akeem from?
Trading Places — Eddie Murphy and Dan Aykroyd swap lives because of a bet for HOW much?
MERCHANT! In Pulp Fiction, who plays Vincent Vega?
Trick question — in Casablanca, does anyone actually say 'Play it again, Sam'?
Looking for movies with that comedian who does the laugh, the SNL guy turned movie star — Beverly Hills, Donkey from Shrek, that one.
I'm hosting a colorful dinner party — need movie titles that have a color in the name. Going for a chromatic vibe.
I want the prestige stuff — top prize at Cannes, you know? Critics-darling territory, the film snob stuff.
Why is Casablanca like a misquoted joke? Because here's looking at you, kid — even though they NEVER said it that way! Cinema!
Watched Trading Places with my landlord. He didn't get it. He's still my landlord. Maybe there's a lesson here.
I tried to quote Casablanca to my lady fair. I said 'play it again, Sam.' She corrected me. She always corrects me.

2026-04-27.dialogue: In Meet the Parents, what is Greg Focker's first name actually short for?
ZOOLANDER! What is Derek Zoolander's signature look called?
By the book — in A Few Good Men, what does Jack Nicholson famously yell?
Dear, in My Cousin Vinny, what state is the trial in?
Yo I want the goofy guy from Night at the Museum, the one in like every dumb-funny comedy. Real awkward energy.
Looking for movies where most of the action goes down in a hospital — wards, surgery rooms, that sterile vibe.
I'm prepping mock trial — I need films with a really good courtroom scene. Lawyer drama, big cross-examination moments.
Why is My Cousin Vinny the perfect courtroom movie? Because you're guilty of LAUGHING the whole time! Order, order!
My future mother-in-law made us watch Meet the Parents before our first dinner together. I have NEVER been more nervous about a meal.
Tried to follow My Cousin Vinny's car identification scene with my truck. Cousin Marisa would NOT have been impressed.

2026-04-28.dialogue: In Harry Potter and the Sorcerer's Stone, what house is Harry sorted into?
In Titanic, what does Rose say to Jack at the end before letting go?
GREMLINS! What is the FIRST rule about Mogwai?
answers: Don't expose them to bright light

2026-04-28.dialogue: Dirty Dancing — what's the iconic line nobody puts Baby in?
